title: 4. Data observability
description: Request volume, RPM, traffic mix, model distribution, errors, and SLA compliance.

options.content: 1. Infrastructure2. Network3. AI4. Data5. User6. Cost & Usage7. Safety & Security

panels.title: Errors (5m)
panels.description: Failures in the last 5 minutes. Shown beside the tabs.

panels.title: Total requests
panels.description: Single headline count for the selected time range with a sparkline trend. Source: Prometheus `increase(ai_gateway_request_count_total[$__range])`.

panels.title: Traffic
RPM
panels.description: Continuous requests-per-minute rate over time. Source: `rate(ai_gateway_request_count_total[$__rate_interval]) × 60`.

panels.title: RPM by Model
panels.description: Stacked area chart — top 6 models by RPM. Uses `$__rate_interval` for consistent smoothing across zoom levels.

panels.title: RPM by Model (current)
panels.description: Top 6 models by current requests/min — ranked bar gauge snapshot.

panels.title: RPM Share by Model
panels.description: Each model's percentage of total RPM (top 6). Companion to the stacked area — shows share, not absolute volume.
Request rate, model split, and share

panels.title: Errors
Error RPM by Model
panels.description: Failed requests per minute per model (top 6). Source: `ai_gateway_exception_count_total`.

panels.title: Error Rate by Model
panels.description: Failed requests as a percentage per model. Yellow/red bands mark 5% / 10% SLA breach territory.
Failed requests per minute and error rate by model

panels.title: Model mix
Model Provider Distribution
panels.description: Traffic split across vendors (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, Google).

panels.title: Model Distribution (last 1h)
panels.description: Which models handled the most requests in the last hour.
Provider and model distribution over the last hour

panels.title: Traffic Volume
Requests / min by Model
panels.description: Live request rate for each model.

panels.title: Requests / min by Department
panels.description: Live request rate for each team or department.

panels.title: Requests / min by Operation
panels.description: Live request rate by use case (e.g. chat, code).

panels.title: Model Distribution (last 1h)
panels.description: Which models handled the most requests in the last hour.

panels.title: Model Provider Distribution
panels.description: Traffic split across vendors (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, Google).
Traffic volume by model, department, and operation

panels.title: Errors & Retries
Error Rate by Type
panels.description: Failures over time, split by error type.

panels.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code (last 1h)
panels.description: Failures by HTTP code (e.g. 429, 500). Tallest bar = most common.

panels.title: Error Category Mix
panels.description: Failures by category. Biggest slice = main issue.
Error types, HTTP status codes, and categories

panels.title: SLA Compliance
SLA Breach Rate by Department
panels.description: Percent of failed requests per department. High means missing targets.

panels.title: Total Requests by Routing Reason (last 1h)

targets.expr: sum by (routing_reason) (count_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | status=~"$status" [1h]))

panels.description: Why each model was chosen (cost, speed, fallback, etc.).
Department SLA breach rate and routing mix

panels.title: Live Request Log
Live Telemetry Events

targets.expr: {service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | status=~"$status" | line_format "{{.timestamp}} [{{.model_name}}] {{.operation_name}} status={{.status}} lat={{.latency_ms}}ms dept={{.department}} routing={{.routing_reason}}"

panels.description: Live stream of recent requests for debugging.
Real-time telemetry event stream
